fields.name: Yasir Naeem
fields.tagline: Full Stack Developer — turning ideas into real web apps with React, Next.js & Django.
fields.description:
BS Computer Science student at the University of Management and Technology (UMT), Lahore, with 6 semesters completed. A Full Stack Developer comfortable across both frontend and backend, with a solid foundation in C++ and a good command of Python.

Experienced in building complete web applications using React, Next.js, and Django, alongside hands-on work in automation and databases. I keep sharpening my programming and problem-solving skills by building real-world university and personal projects.

Currently pursuing BS Computer Science. Relevant coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Systems, Web Technologies, Artificial Intelligence, and Operating Systems.
Built and delivered websites and web applications for clients, handling the full project lifecycle from requirements to deployment using C++, Python, and JavaScript.
fields.technologies: Python, JavaScript, C++, HTML, CSS, Git

fields.description: Set up online storefronts and ran advertising campaigns for clients using Shopify and social media platforms, managing product listings and ad performance.
Ran a buy-sell-resale operation, gaining hands-on experience in customer dealing, negotiation, and product management.

fields.title: AI Route Optimization
fields.description: Finds the shortest routes on a real city map using AI search algorithms (BFS, DFS, UCS, A*) on live OpenStreetMap data, with an interactive Streamlit dashboard that compares each algorithm.

fields.title: Dynamic Portfolio
fields.description: This database-driven portfolio — bio, skills, education, experience, and projects are all managed through the Django admin panel, with an animated aurora UI and an interactive tech orbit.

fields.title: WhatsApp Sender
fields.description: An automation tool that sends bulk WhatsApp messages to a list of numbers read from a data file, using Selenium to drive WhatsApp Web.

fields.title: Hospital Management System
fields.description: A comprehensive console-based Hospital Management System in C++ using Object-Oriented Programming and file handling. Manages doctors, patients, pharmacy, blood bank, ambulance, equipment, lab reports and receipts — with all records persisted to files so data survives between runs.

fields.title: Online Clothing Store
fields.description: A full e-commerce web application for an online clothing brand, built with PHP and MySQL. Features a product storefront, cart and checkout, user accounts, and a secure admin panel to add, edit and manage products.

fields.title: Hotel Management System (DSA)
fields.description: A Hotel Management System in C++ that demonstrates core data structures working together — Linked Lists for floors and rooms, a Queue for booking requests, and a Stack to cancel the last booking. My Data Structures & Algorithms semester project.
fields.technologies: C++, Data Structures, Linked List, Stack, Queue

fields.title: Flight Management System
fields.description: A console-based Flight / Airline Reservation System in C++ built with Object-Oriented Programming — inheritance with Person, Passenger and Staff classes, flight records, seat booking and incident reports.

fields.title: Tic-Tac-Toe (C++ OOP)
fields.description: A feature-rich two-player Tic-Tac-Toe game in C++ using OOP (classes, inheritance and friend classes). Supports in-game commands to edit a player's name, undo the last move, or exit at any time.
